member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.ICallbacksRegistrarExtensions
member.summary: The extension interface for the CallbacksRegistrar Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.ICallbacksRegistrarExtensions.RegisterCallbacks
member.summary: The main entry point for registering callback. Within this function the user will call RegisterCallback(CALLBACK) for each of the callbacks.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.PrimeCallbacksRegistrarTestMethod
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.PrimeCallbacksRegistrarTestMethod.VoidCallbackDelegate
member.summary: The signature for the callbacks.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.PrimeCallbacksRegistrarTestMethod.TestMethodExtension
member.summary: Gets or Sets **not in use will be removed later with the refactoring of the IfeObject**.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.PrimeCallbacksRegistrarTestMethod.RegisterCallbacks
member.summary: The user should override this function with ITME to register his callbacks.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.PrimeCallbacksRegistrarTestMethod.Unload
member.summary: Clean up all callbacks before the unload. DO NOT CHANGE THIS CODE! - During unload if callbacks were not cleard from the CallbacksService first then we'll get a tester crash.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.PrimeCallbacksRegistrarTestMethod.RegisterCallback(Prime.CallbacksService.CallbackDelegate)
member.summary: A function to register a callback to be called later by its name in the code.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.PrimeCallbacksRegistrarTestMethod.RegisterCallback(Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.PrimeCallbacksRegistrarTestMethod.VoidCallbackDelegate)
member.summary: A function to register a callback to be called later by its name in the code.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.IRvCallbacksRegistrarExtensions
member.summary: The extension interface for the CallbacksRegistrar Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.IRvCallbacksRegistrarExtensions.PopulateRvCallbacks
member.summary: The main entry point for registering callback. Within this function the user will call RegisterCallback(CALLBACK) for each of the callbacks.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.OperationMode
member.summary: The mode of operation for this instance.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.OperationMode.REGISTER
member.summary: Register the callbacks.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.OperationMode.UNREGISTER
member.summary: Unregister the callbacks.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.PrimeRvCallbacksRegistrarTestMethod
member.summary: This Test Method is for registering RV callbacks in the flow.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.PrimeRvCallbacksRegistrarTestMethod.Mode
member.summary: Gets or sets the registration mode of the RV callbacks in this instance. REGISTER - All callbacks coming from this instance will be triggered at the post of every instance. UNREGISTER - All callbacks coming from this instance will never be triggered.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.PrimeRvCallbacksRegistrarTestMethod.TestMethodExtension
member.summary: Gets or Sets **not in use will be removed later with the refactoring of the IfeObject**.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.PrimeRvCallbacksRegistrarTestMethod.PopulateRvCallbacks
member.summary: The user should override this function with ITME to register his callbacks.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.PrimeRvCallbacksRegistrarTestMethod.Unload
member.summary: Clean up all callbacks before the unload. DO NOT CHANGE THIS CODE! - During unload if callbacks were not cleard from the TestProgramService first then we'll get a tester crash.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Callbacks.PrimeRvCallbacksRegistrarTestMethod.AddRvCallback(Prime.CallbacksService.RvCallbackDelegate)
member.summary: A function to register a callback to be called later by its name in the code.
